items.title: Port pro feature/pr/pr.merged commands to OpenCode
items.description: Translate /pro:feature, /pro:pr, and /pro:pr.merged from Claude Code command semantics to OpenCode command semantics, preserving workflow behavior and documenting every concession.

items.title: Plan ccplugins command port continuation
items.description: Resume the Claude Code plugin command porting effort by cataloging which commands already exist in OpenCode and which remain outstanding so the next batch can be selected.

items.title: Align install-handoff symlink remediation guidance
items.description: Update the Makefile install-handoff target so that when the symlink points to an unexpected target it emits the same explicit recovery hint as install-colon (e.g., suggest running make uninstall) before exiting with an error, matching coderabbit review feedback.

items.title: Add make help target
items.description: Add a GNU-style "make help" target that prints a concise usage summary of the supported install/uninstall/status commands so users can discover them quickly.

items.title: Unify command and plugin installs
items.description: Refactor the Makefile so `make install` runs both command and plugin installers, introduce `install-commands`/`install-plugins` plus matching uninstall targets, and update docs/help accordingly.

items.title: Add session handoff check command
items.description: Create a /pro command that writes or verifies .plan/session-handoff.md so users can confirm their session handoff snapshot is current before ending work.

items.title: Automate session handoff snapshots and install updates
items.description: Add per-session session-handoff snapshots with acknowledge/dismiss workflows, update installer automation to auto-discover commands, and retire slash namespace installs.

items.title: Add /make: commands for Makefile automation
items.description: Create root-level /make: commands (sibling to /pro:) for Makefile-related utilities: /make:convert (convert package.json scripts to Make targets), /make:setup (setup Make-based workflow), /make:help (add make help target where missing)

items.title: Add Plan-by-default safety rail
items.description: Add a global OpenCode plugin that automatically returns the active primary agent to Plan after any user prompt issued under Build, and provide an explicit Makefile target (make enable-plan-safety) that applies Plan-by-default + Build permission gating to the user's global OpenCode config with backups and dry-run support.

items.title: Deterministic primary agent switching for safety plugins
items.description: Replace the auto-return-to-plan plugin's reliance on `agent.cycle` with a deterministic set-by-name API/event once OpenCode exposes it (e.g., `tui.agent.set { name }` and/or a current-agent query), so the safety rail remains correct even with multiple custom primary agents.

items.title: Harden auto-return-to-plan against custom primary agent cycles
items.description: The current auto-return-to-plan plugin relies on `agent.cycle`, which is only deterministic for the default two-primary-agent setup (Build/Plan). Once upstream exposes deterministic agent switching (e.g. `tui.agent.set { name }`) and/or a current-agent API/event, update the plugin to switch to Plan by name so the safety rail remains correct even with multiple custom primary agents.
